entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum L., a major source of minerals and dietary energy for people in semi-arid regions

entities.name: SAHEL
entities.description: Semi-arid regions where pearl millet is a primary food source

entities.name: MILLET HEAD MINER
entities.description: Heliocheilus albipunctella, a pest that regularly damages pearl millet

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO MILLET HEAD MINER
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet genotypes to resist infestation and damage by Heliocheilus albipunctella

entities.name: GRAIN FE
entities.description: The iron content in pearl millet grains, essential for addressing malnutrition

entities.name: GRAIN ZN
entities.description: The zinc content in pearl millet grains, essential for addressing malnutrition

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL INFESTATION METHOD
entities.description: A technique used to screen pearl millet genotypes for resistance to the millet head miner

entities.name: ANALYSIS OF VARIANCE
entities.description: A statistical method used to reveal significant differences in head miner resistance among tested genotypes

entities.name: ANTIBIOSIS RESISTANCE
entities.description: A specific resistance mechanism exhibited by certain pearl millet genotypes against Heliocheilus albipunctella

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced, which can be negatively associated with Fe and Zn concentrations

entities.name: TOLERANCE TO HEAD MINER DAMAGE
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet genotypes to maintain good performance despite head miner infestation

entities.name: LARVAL PRODUCTION INDEX
entities.description: A morphological measure that shows a positive and significant correlation with head miner damage

entities.name: PANICLE LENGTH
entities.description: A morphological trait of pearl millet that exhibits a negative association with grain Fe and Zn contents

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The region where pearl millet genotypes were assessed for resistance to the millet head miner

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The region where populations suffer from hunger and malnutrition

entities.name: HUNGER AND MALNUTRITION
entities.description: Health conditions prevalent in populations living in the semi-arid tropics

entities.name: AGRONOMY
entities.description: The general growth and performance characteristics of pearl millet genotypes
